steps.content: You are a senior expert in organic synthesis and spectroscopic structure elucidation. All available raw data for sample 4430c431-2741-4a81-bcb9-1323a120fde5 are provided upfront. Use only the provided data and do not call any tools. When finished, output the required FINAL_RESULT block exactly in the specified format.
